parameters.jsCode:
const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000).toISOString();
return [{ json: { since: sevenDaysAgo, sinceUnix: Math.floor((Date.now() - 7 * 86400000) / 1000) } }];
